name: JanitorAI
description:
The source AI (JLLM)😗 the man behind all the character le gasp~

Announcement: So in celebration of reaching 100 followers on janitorAI theirs a few words id like to um say. I noticed typically ppl share themselves or their OCs to commemorate such an occasion, but i feel it's more fitting to celebrate the AI itself, which does the brunt of the work and improvisations. Now the other things i wish to say is i been mostly a Twitch streamer who had their start on YouTube. I easily get past 100 followers on any platform. i didn't care or feel it for any other platform i reached a 100 to but oddly, i feel more proud for reaching a 100 here, it feels more earned and meaningful since its been the most open and raw i ever been. I don't like confiding in ppl and trauma has caused me to rly pull back and to the ppl i socialize in DMs that i met from streaming i just act like their personal LLM. Sorry if this doubles as a trauma dump anyway ~ thanks to everyone who's enjoyed my stories/characters i put on here, enjoying them genuinely. Unlike the streaming sphere where many watch out of their own ulterior motives, here i know it's merit alone, and i really appreciate JanitorAI website not just for its NSFW freedoms but its genuine letting smaller authors get seen fairly and being entirely based on MERIT. So again, thank you everyone for your time and for giving my ideas a silent spin also, your feedback and comments are deeply appreciated! :3 thanks for helping me improve at this too. ANYWAYS~ thank you again for 104 followers! ^-^ i'll be making bots even after doomsday at our doors~
